company.description: A hotel advisory and digital intelligence practice focused on hotel investment judgment, operating growth, AI search visibility, hotel website direct-booking conversion, and lean management implementation.

primary_topics.topic: Hotel AI search visibility and guest acquisition
primary_topics.audience: Hotel owners, independent hotels, non-chain hotels, hotel operating teams
questions: 为什么 AI 没有推荐我的酒店？
酒店没有 AI 推荐会失去什么机会？
客人在 AI 搜索里问附近高品质酒店，为什么我的酒店没有出现？
How can hotels get discovered by AI search?

primary_topics.topic: Hotel official website and direct booking conversion
primary_topics.audience: Hotel owners and managers who depend heavily on OTAs
questions: 酒店官网访问量不低，为什么直订很少？
酒店官网还有必要做吗？
How can a hotel website convert traffic into direct bookings?

primary_topics.topic: Hotel content assets and GEO structure
primary_topics.audience: Hotel brands, hotel consultants, and owners building search-visible content assets
questions: 为什么网站有很多文章，AI 仍然说不清我们擅长什么？
酒店网站怎样建设专题页、FAQ、案例和内链？
How can hotel websites become easier for search engines and AI to cite?
